---
title: "Rich Ramsey, PhD"
subtitle: "Cognitive Neuroscience Researcher"
image: ./img/cbs_hex.png
image-title: Cognitive Brain Sciences Hex Sticker
logo: ./img/favicon.jpeg
about: 
  template: solana
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 15em
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
---

I am a Senior Scientist at ETH Zürich. 
My research interests span a range of topics in social and cognitive neuroscience, and my group embraces recent developments in methods and meta-science. 
I am also a member of the Learning and Instruction Laboratory ([LI Lab](https://li.ethz.ch/)), and the Neural Control of Movement Laboratory ([NCM Lab](https://ncm.hest.ethz.ch/)).
